name: Princess & The Boss
overview: Keira has a negative impact on a cosmetic product called Beaucity, which makes her responsible. Initially, Keira thought that the task would be easy to complete, especially since she had researched Soraya, the owner of Beaucity. Surprisingly, Keira doesn't meet Soraya but her son named Naraka, a man who is ready to make Keira's life a living hell.

trailers.title: Princess & The Boss - Official Trailer | Coming Soon on Maxtream
